title: ruta coronata
intro: Ruta coronata, also known as Rue or Herb-of-Grace, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruta coronata include relief from headaches, arthritis, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to improve digestion and boost the immune system. Ruta coronata can be prepared as herbal tea, essential oil, or dried herb, and is also used in skincare products to treat acne and wounds.
